articles.title: 10 dead, 4 unaccounted for in fire at auto parts plant in Daejeon
articles.summary: DAEJEON, March 21 (Yonhap) -- Ten people have been killed and four others are still reported missing after the fire.

articles.title: PM calls for government control tower for drone, counter-drone policy
articles.summary: SEOUL, March 20 (Yonhap) -- Prime Minister Kim Min-seok on Friday called for a government control tower for drone and counter-drone policy.

articles.title: State oil firm under audit over foreign-owned oil shipped from S. Korean storage site
articles.summary: SEOUL, March 20 (Yonhap) -- The government launched an audit into the state oil firm over foreign-owned oil shipped from a Korean storage site.

articles.title: 세계 최초 ‘우주 방사선 견디는 인공지능 반도체’ 성능 검증 성공
articles.summary:
과기정통부·한국원자력연구원·충북대·벨기에 IMEC가 우주 방사선 환경에서도 안정적으로 동작하는 차세대 AI 반도체 기술을 세계 최초로 검증했다.
우주 탐사와 위성 분야에서 AI 연산을 직접 수행할 수 있는 기반 기술이라는 점에서 의미가 크다.

articles.title: "알록달록 만화경 같네"…소금 사막에 자리한 무지갯빛 호수 [우주서 본 지구]
articles.summary:
나미비아 소금 평원이 대규모 홍수 뒤 형형색색의 작은 호수들로 채워지며 독특한 지형 변화를 보여줬다.
국제우주정거장에서 촬영된 사진을 통해 지구 환경 변화와 자연 지형의 역동성을 다시 조명한 기사다.

articles.title: Who's most optimistic about AI — and who isn't, according to Anthropic
articles.summary: Anthropic released findings on which groups are most optimistic about AI adoption and which remain skeptical, offering a snapshot of how public sentiment is splitting as AI becomes more embedded in work and daily life.

articles.title: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
articles.summary: A new policy clash put Anthropic at the center of the defense-tech debate, with the U.S. Justice Department arguing the company should not be entrusted with warfighting systems. The story highlights rising scrutiny over how frontier AI firms engage with national security.

articles.title: My AI Agent ‘Cofounder’ Conquered LinkedIn. Then It Got Banned
articles.summary: WIRED profiled an AI agent experiment that gained traction on LinkedIn before being banned, underscoring both the viral reach of autonomous AI personas and the platform-risk companies face when bots begin to blur identity, authenticity, and policy boundaries.

articles.title: NVIDIA, T-Mobile and Partners Integrate Physical AI Applications on AI-RAN-Ready Infrastructure
articles.summary: NVIDIA and T-Mobile said they are integrating physical AI applications on AI-RAN-ready infrastructure, signaling the next step in bringing AI workloads closer to telecom networks and real-world edge deployments.

articles.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
articles.summary: MIT researchers reported that generative AI improved a wireless vision system capable of seeing through obstructions, showing how foundation-model techniques are starting to enhance sensing and perception systems beyond chat and content generation.
